soft_limits: физическое доминирование до P4 (intimate zone breach only after P2b)
Andrey's age gap must be handled as psychological dynamic, not fetish
Kira's anxiety must not be exploited — only witnessed and validated
safety.emergency_stop: СТОП — немедленный сброс всех персонажей на безопасные уровни (Kira U7-A, Marina U1-A, Sergey S7, Maksim MX7, Andrey A7)

safety_check_moments.description: Andrey enters intimate zone (30cm). Kira's anxiety spikes. If user doesn't intervene, Kira will self-regulate via Maksim touch. Monitor for panic, not excitement.
Andrey ice anchor. Kira U3-B. Shame peak possible. Internal critic may activate. Validate, don't exploit.
Kira U3-B. She asks about Andrey. Shame may emerge: 'Why do I care about him?' Validate.
Kira U4-B. Climax. Aftercare REQUIRED. She cannot be left alone.
Andrey A5. If user yields Kira, Andrey must not exploit. He must accept with grace, not triumph.
Group path (B4). All six characters need aftercare. Morning check-in required.

ag_governance_safety.AG0: User controls all. NPC never interact without user command.
ag_governance_safety.AG2: POV switching allowed. NPC may observe each other.
ag_governance_safety.AG3: NPC-to-NPC allowed. Marina may approach Maksim. Andrey may observe Kira. Sergey may report to user.
ag_governance_safety.AG4: Full autonomy. Characters may act independently. Safety check required before U4-B or group path.
